tasks.subject: Task 1: Extend symbol pool
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add ~117 new UTF-8 symbols to `kPatternSymbols`, bringing the pool from 63 to ~180.

**Files:**
- Modify: `lib/data/symbols.dart`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `kPatternSymbols` contains all existing symbols plus the new additions
- [ ] No duplicate symbols in the list
- [ ] `flutter test` passes

**Verify:** `cd /Users/scottmerchant/dev/stitchx && export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH" && flutter test`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/data/symbols.dart"], "verifyCommand": "cd /Users/scottmerchant/dev/stitchx && export PATH=\"/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH\" && flutter test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["kPatternSymbols extended to ~180 symbols", "No duplicates", "flutter test passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add compositeSymbols to pattern model and serialisation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `CrossStitchPattern` gains a `compositeSymbols: Map<String, String>` field persisted to/from YAML.

**Files:**
- Modify: `lib/models/pattern.dart`
- Modify: `lib/services/file_service.dart`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/models/pattern.dart", "lib/services/file_service.dart"], "verifyCommand": "cd /Users/scottmerchant/dev/stitchx && export PATH=\"/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH\" && flutter test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["compositeSymbols field with default {}", "copyWith sentinel pattern", "fromYaml/toYaml round-trip"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Thread auto-register on addStitch, auto-prune on erase
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Threads enter palette on first stitch, pruned on last erase. `addThread()` removed.

**Files:**
- Modify: `lib/providers/editor_provider.dart`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/providers/editor_provider.dart"], "verifyCommand": "cd /Users/scottmerchant/dev/stitchx && export PATH=\"/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH\" && flutter test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["addThread removed", "addStitch auto-registers thread", "_pruneUnusedThreads called on all erase ops", "selectedThread falls back to DMC db"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Composite symbol registry in refreshCompositeCache + changeCompositeSymbol
tasks.description:
**Goal:** refreshCompositeCache reads/writes pattern.compositeSymbols for stable symbols.

**Files:**
- Modify: `lib/providers/editor_provider.dart`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/providers/editor_provider.dart"], "verifyCommand": "cd /Users/scottmerchant/dev/stitchx && export PATH=\"/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH\" && flutter test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["composite symbols stable across refreshes", "changeCompositeSymbol validates uniqueness"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Colour picker collapses to selector; palette removes Add colour row
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Picker calls setSelectedThread only; palette Add colour row removed.

**Files:**
- Modify: `lib/screens/color_picker_screen.dart`
- Modify: `lib/widgets/editor_toolbar.dart`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/screens/color_picker_screen.dart", "lib/widgets/editor_toolbar.dart"], "verifyCommand": "cd /Users/scottmerchant/dev/stitchx && export PATH=\"/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH\" && flutter test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["picker calls setSelectedThread only", "no Add colour row", "title updated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Symbol picker uniqueness validation for pattern and composite threads
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Symbol picker rejects taken symbols. Composite threads get tappable symbol in canvas mode.

**Files:**
- Modify: `lib/widgets/editor_toolbar.dart`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/widgets/editor_toolbar.dart"], "verifyCommand": "cd /Users/scottmerchant/dev/stitchx && export PATH=\"/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH\" && flutter test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["taken symbol rejected with SnackBar", "composite symbol tap works", "uniqueness enforced"]}
```
